case_title: COLBERT, TANYA DBA A TASTE OF HEAVEN VS FRANDELJA ENRICHMENT CENTER,A CA.PUBLICBENEFITCORP et al

docket_entries.description: CASE_TRANSFERRED TO SUPERIOR COURT, APPELLATE NUMBER 26850, RECORD TRANSFERRED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF COLBERT, TANYA DBA A TASTE OF HEAVEN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FRANDELJA ENRICHMENT CENTER,A CA.PUBLICBENEFITCORP FRANDELJA CENTER $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,000.00, PLTF PROVED THE EXISTENCE OF AN ORAL PERSONAL SERVICE CONTRACT THAT WAS TO RUN FOR 1 YEAR. DEFT BREACHED THAT CONTRACT W/O CAUSE. DAMAGES ARE FOR LOST WAGES. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
